description: Cloudflare Tunnel plugin — runs cloudflared to expose local sites to the internet through a secure encrypted tunnel (no port-forwarding, no public IP). Manages tunnel lifecycle, DNS record routing via the Cloudflare API, and zone configuration. Settings: API token (with Account > Cloudflare Tunnel > Edit + Zone > DNS > Edit scopes), account ID, tunnel ID, tunnel token (JWT), and path to cloudflared binary.
author: NKS
